utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not believe we are here .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh you have got to be kidding me .

emotion_cause.span: 2_you have got to be kidding me .

utterances.speaker: Front Desk Clerk
utterances.text: As a wedding gift to you , the hotel would like to give you the honeymoon suite .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! ! You have been screwing us all day !

emotion_cause.span: 5_You have been screwing us all day !
5_You have been screwing us all day !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We are you just ten seconds later !

emotion_cause.span: 7_We are you just ten seconds later !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You already got the first class tickets ... you got the lounge !

emotion_cause.span: 9_I mean we should get free stuff too !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean we should get free stuff too !

emotion_cause.span: 9_I mean we should get free stuff too !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean you are not the only ones on your honeymoon !

emotion_cause.span: 9_I mean we should get free stuff too !

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: Well you can have the suite if you want .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: We do not care about where we stay .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: We are here to celebrate our love together .

emotion_cause.span: 13_We are here to celebrate our love together .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: We do not have to get free stuff .

utterances.speaker: Woman
utterances.text: We just want to be together .
